Granular Marketing Programs

Go-to-Market Playbooks & Launch Campaigns

Go-to-market playbooks and launch campaigns that help EdTech brands stand out and scale.

Book a strategy session

Every campaign at 27zero starts with a decision record, not a moodboard. Before a single creative asset gets produced, we document the strategy, the audience, the messaging hierarchy, and how success will be measured — so creative and execution teams are building toward the same target from day one. Used for product launches, market entries, and competitive repositioning.

What this looks like

Marketing Plan / GTM Strategy

The master acquisition strategy for an engagement — Ideal Customer Profile definition, budget guidance, event selection, CRM strategy, lead qualification logic, and a content calendar. Typically the first deliverable, gating everything that follows.

Campaign Playbook

A structured document produced before each campaign launches — strategy, creative concept, audience targeting, messaging hierarchy, asset list, deployment timeline, and measurement. The complete decision record every downstream asset traces back to.

Creative Concept

The overarching idea that unifies a campaign: central theme, visual direction, tonal approach — presented for approval before design begins.

Initial Strategy Workshop

A structured kickoff session to align on objectives, validate the Ideal Customer Profile and personas, confirm message priorities, and co-build the quarterly planning framework.

Live Deployment Recommendations

A written brief produced before each campaign goes live, specifying audience targeting, timing, cadence, platform placement, and A/B testing parameters.

Part of Granular Marketing Programs

Launch with a plan, not just a deadline.

Book a free strategy session See our work

Free · 30 minutes · No sales pitch
